title: Permanym: Beat the bots. Hire the humans.
excerpt: Automated resume spam is overwhelming hiring teams. Permanym helps you cut through application volume to focus on candidate quality.
content_html:
Automated resume spam is overwhelming hiring teams and filling pipelines with noise. Permanym helps you cut through application volume to focus on candidate quality.

How it works

From start to finish in under a minute

Getting started is as easy as adding a custom verification link to your job listings. From there, candidates will follow the simple steps below during the application process.

Step 1

Bot check

Blocks most automated traffic before verification even begins. Stays out of sight where possible, with no puzzles required.

Step 2

Email check

Further raises the cost of automated abuse, validates the applicant's email address, and ties the verification to the submitted resume.

Step 3

Liveness check

Confirms in seconds that a real person is completing the verification. Detects common spoofing attempts, including photos, videos, 3D masks, and attempts to bypass the camera.

Step 4

Successful verification

Delivers greater confidence that each submission came from a legitimate human applicant. Hiring teams can review completed verifications and use the captured selfie to ensure the same person progresses from application to onboarding.

Benefits

Why hiring teams choose us

Protect your applicant pipeline without changing your hiring process. Stop automated submissions before they crowd out qualified candidates.

Easy setup

Works with any ATS, no technical integration required.

Low friction

Stops automated submissions without slowing legitimate candidates down.

Built for scale

Designed for security, reliability, and scalability from day one.

Win-win solution

Delivers a faster, fairer hiring experience for employers and applicants alike.

Pricing

Your success is what counts

Choose the plan that fits your team. Only successful verifications count toward your plan limit.

FAQ

Questions hiring teams ask

What problem are you solving?

Employers are facing a growing wave of automated AI submissions, fake applications, and low-effort spam. This can overwhelm hiring teams, slow down screening, and make it harder to focus on qualified candidates. As a result, confidence and trust decline for everyone involved.

Why use liveness checks?

A brief liveness check during the application process helps your organization identify automated and fraudulent submissions, protects recruiter time with a streamlined pipeline, and gives hiring managers greater confidence in the candidates moving forward. This creates a more efficient and fairer process for both hiring teams and legitimate applicants.

Is our ATS supported?

Yes. Permanym fits into your existing hiring process, no matter what tools you use today. Simply include a verification link in your application instructions to get started. Deeper ATS integrations can support more advanced workflows, such as filtering candidates before they reach your recruiting team.

Ready when you are

Set up in minutes. Verify in seconds. Save hours.

The hiring landscape is changing. Give your team the tools to keep up.

content_html_zh:
自动简历垃圾邮件让招聘团队不堪重负，管道中充满了噪音。 Permanym 帮助您减少申请量，专注于候选人质量。

它是如何运作的

从开始到结束不到一分钟

入门就像将自定义验证链接添加到您的职位列表一样简单。 从那里，候选人将在申请过程中遵循以下简单步骤。

Step 1

机器人检查

在验证开始之前阻止大多数自动化流量。 尽可能保持在视线之外，不需要拼图。

Step 2

电子邮件检查

进一步提高自动滥用的成本，验证申请人的电子邮件地址，并将验证与提交的简历联系起来。

Step 3

活性检查

在几秒钟内确认真人正在完成验证。 检测常见的欺骗尝试，包括照片、视频、3D 蒙版以及绕过摄像头的尝试。

Step 4

验证成功

让您更加确信每份提交内容均来自合法的人类申请人。 招聘团队可以审查已完成的验证，并使用捕获的自拍照来确保同一个人从申请到入职的进展。

好处

为什么招聘团队选择我们

在不改变招聘流程的情况下保护您的申请人渠道。 在自动提交排挤合格候选人之前停止自动提交。

设置简单

可与任何 ATS 配合使用，无需技术集成。

低摩擦

停止自动提交，而不会减慢合法候选人的速度。

专为规模而打造

从第一天起就为安全性、可靠性和可扩展性而设计。

双赢的解决方案

为雇主和申请人提供更快、更公平的招聘体验。

定价

您的成功才是最重要的

选择适合您团队的计划。 只有成功的验证才会计入您的计划限额。

FAQ

招聘团队提出的问题

你要解决什么问题？

雇主正面临着越来越多的自动化人工智能提交、虚假申请和毫不费力的垃圾邮件浪潮。 这可能会让招聘团队不堪重负，减慢筛选速度，并让我们更难专注于合格的候选人。 结果，每个参与者的信心和信任度都会下降。

为什么要使用活性检查？

在申请过程中进行简短的活跃度检查可以帮助您的组织识别自动提交和欺诈性的提交，通过简化的渠道保护招聘人员的时间，并让招聘经理对候选人的前进更有信心。 这为招聘团队和合法申请人创造了更高效、更公平的流程。

我们的 ATS 受支持吗？

是的。 无论您现在使用什么工具，Permanym 都适合您现有的招聘流程。 只需在您的申请说明中包含验证链接即可开始。 更深入的 ATS 集成可以支持更高级的工作流程，例如在候选人到达招聘团队之前对其进行筛选。

当你准备好时

只需几分钟即可完成设置。 几秒钟内即可验证。 节省时间。

招聘格局正在发生变化。 为您的团队提供跟上步伐的工具。
